title: AntiCreeperDestroy
description: Creeper can hurt you,  can't destroy blocks and drop items
body:
## AntiCreeperDestroy
### 一个*简单的* Minecraft 插件，防止苦力怕对方块和掉落物品造成破坏，但仍然保留爆炸效果和对玩家的伤害！无需任何配置，直接使用！
### A *simple* Minecraft plugin that prevents creepers from destroying blocks and dropped items, but still retains the explosion effect and damage to players！No configuration required, just use it directly!

### 有问题？欢迎前往 GitHub Issues，然后创建一个新的 issue！
### Have problems? Welcome to GitHub Issues, and create a new issue!
[点击前往 Click To Go!](https://github.com/MCFurina/AntiCreeperDestroy/issues)

![Prevent damage and keep the explosion effect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c174518ed2f011002c0e7e9d559d1302737fdea_0.webp)
